=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (4:7-4:14) TS377055: Avoid extending the native 'Error' class directly. Consider using a tagged error (e.g. Data.TaggedError) to maintain type safety in the Effect failure channel. effect(extendsNativeError)
  Fix 0: "Disable extendsNativeError for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable extendsNativeError for entire file"

  Fix 0: "Disable extendsNativeError for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable extendsNativeError for entire file"

  Fix 0: "Disable extendsNativeError for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable extendsNativeError for entire file"
